allow: PowerShell($pid8720 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8720 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($pid8720\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8720 -Force -Confirm:$false; "stopped PID $pid8720" } else { "nothing listening on 8720" })
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Part 1: gateway spine — streamable HTTP MCP endpoint with API-key auth *)

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 8720, 9101, 9102\) { $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -Confirm:$false; "stopped $port \(pid $p\)" } })
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Part 2: upstream proxy core — namespaced tool catalog and call routing *)
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Part 3: encrypted vault + upstream OAuth with linked accounts *)
